ksa_text: Skill in drafting and reviewing data processing agreements, including controller-processor terms, sub-processor obligations, cross-border transfer provisions, and regulatory compliance clauses.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Regulatory Compliance falls outside the primary competency scope of the VP Analytics. This skill KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is Regulatory Compliance truly out-of-scope for the VP Analytics? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list Regulatory Compliance as a core or recommended competency for the VP Analytics. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms Regulatory Compliance falls outside the established competency profile for the VP Analytics. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Regulatory Compliance is outside the competency scope of the VP Analytics. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
